caption: A man with short dark hair and a light-skinned complexion is seen speaking in a studio setting. He wears a blue button-down shirt with a small "INFO OBJECTS" logo on the left chest and a discreet headset microphone. He is seated behind a dark table where a black folder or notebook rests. In the background, a light-colored wall features the logos "theCUBE" and "siliconANGLE", along with a smaller "SPONSORED BY INFO OBJECTS" logo. Across the frames, the man is speaking and gesturing with his right hand, which becomes visible in the second frame. In the bottom frames, a blue graphic overlay appears at the bottom left, displaying the text "RISHI YADAV | @meditativesoul", followed by "CEO" and "infoObjects" below his name. The man's facial expression and head position shift slightly as he continues to talk.
